name: Node.js Express API
description: Creates a basic Node.js Express API with a layered structure.

commands.command: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path {{projectName}} ; cd {{projectName}} ; npm init -y ; npm install express ; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path src/routes, src/controllers, src/services
commands.description: Initialize project, install Express, and create folder structure safely.

commands.command: Out-File -FilePath src/index.js -Encoding utf8 -InputObject "const express = require('express');`nconst app = express();`nconst port = 3000;`napp.get('/', (req, res) => res.send('Hello World!'));`napp.listen(port, () => console.log(`Example app listening on port ${port}!`));"
